message:
test(fcp-core): pin Handshake* discovery cluster JSON+CBOR serde matrix (flywheel_connectors-3drj0)

Bead asks for MeshDiscovery JSON+CBOR roundtrip pinning. No type
literally named MeshDiscovery exists in fcp-core; the closest mesh
discovery surface is the hub↔connector handshake cluster at
protocol.rs:285+331+211+226+362+382+393. These messages bring up the
connector mesh node: HandshakeRequest, HandshakeResponse, HostInfo,
TransportCaps, EventCaps, AuthCaps, OAuthConfig.

No existing test pinned these — grep for HandshakeRequest in
crates/fcp-core/tests/ returns empty.

Coverage: HandshakeRequest 9-field shape pinned, skip-when-None
semantics for zone_dir + host + transport_caps + requested_instance_id,
host_public_key + nonce serialize as 32-element JSON arrays (no
hex_or_bytes adapter — pin so future addition trips loudly),
capabilities_requested empty Vec serializes as [] (no skip_serializing_if)
and missing key decodes back to empty via #[serde(default)],
HostInfo skip-when-None for version + build, TransportCaps default state
(empty Vec compression + None max_frame_size), EventCaps #[serde(default)]
per field, HandshakeResponse 8-field shape with nested OAuthConfig
round-trip, JSON+CBOR cross-format equality, distinct-nonce sentinel
(security-critical binding), distinct-host-pubkey sentinel.

15 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-3drj0 cargo test -p
fcp-core --test mesh_discovery_serde_matrix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
